productDisplayName: Timberland Men's Prem Wheat Yellow Shoe
description: These six inch boots from timberland are great for exploring the great outdoors or for traversing the urban terrain. The sturdy design incorporates premium material and wearer friendly features to give you greater comfort and grip. Team this with jeans and shirts for a great casual look.Upper Premium waterproof leather with seam-sealed direct-attach construction for durability and comfort Padded collar provides comfort and prevents debris from entering Lace-ups with metallic eyelets for a snug Fit White stitch detailing Brand logo embossed on the side of heel Midsole Cushioned leather footbed for all day comfort Outsole Classic rubber outsole with aggressive lugs on the heel and forefoot for greater traction Wash careUse the appropriate timberland leather shoe polish to keep your shoes cleanDo not use polish over canvas/woven areas
